stepAnswer: Null: Cheese types follow the employee distribution. Any difference is due to chance. Alt: Cheese types do not follow the employee distribution. Any difference is not due to chance.
stepTitle: A) Write a valid null and alternative hypothesis for this experiment.
choices: Null: Chloe’s sample is too small. Any difference is due to chance. Alt: Chloe’s sample is large enough. Any difference is not due to chance.
Null: Cheese types follow the employee distribution. Any difference is due to chance. Alt: Cheese types do not follow the employee distribution. Any difference is not due to chance.
Null: Gruyère will never appear. Any difference is due to chance. Alt: Gruyère will always appear. Any difference is not due to chance.
Null: The mean cheese type is correct. Any difference is due to chance. Alt: The median cheese type is incorrect. Any difference is not due to chance.
